mature_pattern_refs: Temporal HITL: Signal verdict + Query status + durable wait (terminal scope only)
LangGraph interrupt: approve/reject/edit/respond at activity boundary
OPA: allow / deny / needs_review + decision log
HumanLayer 12-factor Factor7: contact humans with tool calls, not user log carrying
root_cause_cn: 审核被实现成整车手刹 WAITING_GROK，而非自动拉取的外部授权。SessionStart 只 Notify 不 Receive/leg2；桥接不可用时机器分不清「等 Grok」还是「等用户搬材料」。

architecture_cn.correct_model: 审核=自动拉取的授权流程；Grok=审批 lane，不是停车锁
architecture_cn.opa_role: allow / deny / needs_review 路由分类；不替 Grok 做语义判决
architecture_cn.grok_bridge_gate: grok_bridge_availability=available 时自动 Receive+审+leg2；unavailable 时落可恢复审核请求单+scheduled_retry，禁止让用户搬日志
architecture_cn.l1_continue_whitelist: bounded implementation worker、observe JSONL、pass_partial 下一包可并行；终端动作等 signal

codex_must_implement.summary_cn: temporal_codex_task_workflow.py + l1_l2_segment_gate.py：grok_segment_verdict_wait_blocking 仅挡 completion_claim/stop/l2；禁止挡 continue_same_task 与 codex_worker_turn_activity
codex_must_implement.acceptance: 5d33 Event History 在 leg2 未到前仍可派下一 bounded worker；named_blocker 不得长期 GROK_SEGMENT_AUDIT_VERDICT_REQUIRED 挡续跑

codex_must_implement.summary_cn: 命中 GROK_SEGMENT_AUDIT_VERDICT_REQUIRED 等：OPA 输出 needs_review→自动生成审核请求单→触发 leg1 Send-CodexSegmentAuditSummonToGrokV2；auto_continue 仅限非段边界续跑白名单
codex_must_implement.acceptance: 无需用户喊审查即可 leg1；decision log 可查

codex_must_implement.summary_cn: 在 human_egress_router / codex_to_grok_segment_audit_summon / grok_l1_l2_segment_gate task state 写入 grok_bridge_availability、audit_request_status、scheduled_retry_at、recoverable_audit_request_ref

fields.recoverable_audit_request_ref: path to summon task json + grok_report.zh.md

codex_must_implement.acceptance: panel-readback 三行能区分「等 Grok 桥」vs「等 verdict signal」vs「续跑中」；never 显示「请用户搬日志」

codex_must_implement.summary_cn: leg1 到了但 Grok 窗/桥不可用：写 recoverable 审核单 + scheduled_retry timer/activity 重试 leg1 与 Notify Grok SessionStart 路径；Temporal 持久不丢
codex_must_implement.acceptance: 关 Grok 窗后 reopen 或 retry 到期能自动接上，无需用户粘贴 JSONL

grok_island_parallel_weld.note_cn: Grok 岛同步焊（Codex 勿改 Grok 源码除非用户授权）；A 读 state 字段对齐即可

forbidden: 给 A 自审最终 PASS 权
OPA auto_continue 替代 Grok 语义段审
acceptance_machine: worker 续跑不因 WAITING_GROK 停车
scheduled_retry 在 bridge unavailable 时可恢复
